case_title: GERALD THOMAS CHESSER JR VS. ROBERTO GUTIERREZ III

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-05-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF GERALD THOMAS CHESSER JR. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHESSER JR, GERALD THOMAS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,850.00 FILED BY CHESSER JR, GERALD THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ III, ROBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GEOFF HOWARD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
